mag3110_init.tooltip: Initialize MAG3110 triple axis magnetometer sensor via I2C

mag3110_data_ready.tooltip: Check if MAG3110 has new data available

mag3110_read_axis.tooltip: Read MAG3110 raw magnetic field value for the specified axis

mag3110_read_microtesla.tooltip: Read MAG3110 magnetic field value in micro-Tesla for the specified axis

mag3110_read_heading.tooltip: Read MAG3110 heading angle in degrees (calibration required)

mag3110_enter_cal_mode.tooltip: Enter MAG3110 calibration mode, rotate the sensor 360° to calibrate

mag3110_calibrate.tooltip: Perform one calibration step, call continuously in loop until calibration completes

mag3110_is_calibrated.tooltip: Check if MAG3110 calibration is complete

mag3110_is_calibrating.tooltip: Check if MAG3110 is currently calibrating
